'''Domitree''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Ord Thoden]]. In [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]] it was devastated by a [[Groundquake/Legends|groundquake]].

{{City-stub}}
